heading: Frequently Asked
subtitle: Common questions about my services, availability, and how we can work together.
ctaText: Still have a question? I'd love to hear from you.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: I offer full-stack web development, backend and API design, AI/LLM integration (RAG, multi-agent systems), and technical consulting — from architecture reviews to production implementation.

items.question: Are you available for freelance or contract work?
items.answer: Yes. I'm open to remote freelance projects and part-time contracts. Reach out via the contact page or WhatsApp to discuss your timeline and requirements.

items.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
items.answer: My core stack is React, Next.js, Node.js, and NestJS, with strong experience in MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker, AWS, and AI tooling such as LangChain, LangGraph, and RAG pipelines.

items.question: Do you work with AI and LLM integrations?
items.answer: Yes. I've built production AI systems including RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, tool-calling agents, and MCP integrations for enterprise assistants and SaaS products.

items.question: How do you typically engage on a project?
items.answer: Engagements usually start with a discovery call to understand goals, scope, and timeline. I then propose a phased approach — MVP delivery, iterative builds, or ongoing contract support depending on your needs.

items.question: Do you provide fixed-price or hourly billing?
items.answer: Both are possible depending on scope clarity. Fixed-price works well for defined MVPs; hourly or retainer models suit ongoing development, maintenance, or advisory work.

items.question: Can you join an existing team?
items.answer: Absolutely. I regularly collaborate with in-house teams as a senior engineer — contributing to architecture, backend systems, code reviews, and shipping features in agile sprints.

items.question: What is your typical response time?
items.answer: I aim to respond to new inquiries within 24–48 hours on business days. For active engagements, communication happens through agreed channels with regular status updates.

items.question: Do you sign NDAs?
items.answer: Yes. I'm happy to sign NDAs before discussing sensitive project details, architecture, or proprietary business information.

items.question: How can I get started?
items.answer: Use the contact form on this site, email me directly, or message on WhatsApp/LinkedIn. Share a brief overview of your project and we'll schedule a call to explore fit.
